log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 15 (d20:15 + 0)
Kobold — Bardic Musician: 10 (d20:8 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Kobold — Bardic Musician HP: 48/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Kobold — Bardic Musician HP: 31/67
⚡ Kobold — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:8 total 18 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Kobold — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Kobold — Bardic Musician casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: SUCCESS
Kobold — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Kobold — Bardic Musician for 9. HP: 40/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Kobold — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
→ Concentration save: [22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Kobold — Bardic Musician HP: 12/67
→ Concentration save: [10 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 26 damage. Kobold — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===

→ Kobold — Bardic Musician reverts from Polymorph to original form (HP: 67/67)
